class.name: HEGoLogManager
class.brief_description: Singleton log signal bridge for HEGo runtime messages.
class.description:
HEGo logging helpers emit console output and forward messages through this object via [signal log_message].
Use this class from UI code to display live HEGo logs without parsing console output.
The singleton is created during module initialization and remains available while the extension is loaded.

method.name: emit_log_message
method.description:
Emits [signal log_message] with the given message and level.
This is primarily used internally by HEGo log utility functions.

method.name: get_singleton
method.description:
Returns the global [HEGoLogManager] instance.
Returns [code]null[/code] only if the singleton has not been created or was destroyed.

signal.name: log_message
signal.description:
Emitted for each HEGo log entry.
Common level strings are [code]MESSAGE[/code], [code]WARNING[/code], [code]ERROR[/code], and [code]LINE[/code].
The [code]message[/code] payload does not include the console prefix string used by internal print helpers.
